decisions.decision: Fallback to first scene in scenes object when requested scene ID not found
decisions.rationale: Editor creates scene IDs as timestamps (scene_1774962424469), not 'start'. Hardcoded default should degrade gracefully.

next_action: git commit the ScriptEngine.startGame() fix, then ask user about remaining issues they mentioned
context_notes: Root cause: ScriptEngine.startGame('start') could not find scene ID 'start' because editor generates timestamp-based IDs. Title screen rendered fine because it reads ui.titleScreen config independently. User's project: my-second-vn, exported to ../real-temp/. Asset files use Chinese filenames (大海.jpg, 教室.webp, 屏幕截图...). Also noticed a missing wav audio file in export.
